ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Continued To Jul-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Melissa Hamilton specially appeared for attorney Paul Horn, counsel to Emily Reyes, Administrator (via Zoom).

Ms. Hamilton reported that the petition for final distribution was submitted for e-filing on June 16, 2025, but as of the hearing, it remained pending in the e-filing system.

Accordingly, the Court continued the status hearing to July 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for the e-filing to be processed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
